summary: Health Monitor — weekly digest email to admin role
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to receive a weekly digest email summarizing connector health status across all data sources, so that I can proactively identify and remediate integration issues before they impact downstream processes.

**Background**: The Connector Health Monitor tracks the operational status of all configured connectors in the tenant. Weekly summaries help workspace admins maintain visibility into data pipeline reliability without requiring constant manual monitoring.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
1. System sends a weekly email to workspace-admin role users every Monday at 08:00 UTC containing connector health summary
2. Email includes status indicators (healthy, warning, critical) for each connector along with last successful sync timestamp
3. Email includes a direct link to the Connector Health Monitor dashboard filtered to the recipient's workspace
4. Email is suppressed if all connectors are healthy and no warnings occurred during the reporting period

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Starting implementation. Will use existing email service template engine for the digest format.
